ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing size */,
  "c_size" INTEGER /* Size in the CELINE standard */,
  "fr_size" INTEGER /* Size in the French standard */,
  "es_size" INTEGER /* Size in the Spanish standard */,
  "de_size" INTEGER /* Size in the German standard */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* Size in the UK standard */,
  "us_size" INTEGER /* Size in the US standard */,
  "it_size" INTEGER /* Size in the Italian standard */,
  "jp_size" INTEGER /* Size in the Japanese standard */,
  "cn_size" TEXT /* Size in the Chinese standard */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "size_category" TEXT /* Category of the size */,
  "size_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the product is designed for */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_image" TEXT /* URL or reference to the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the inventory record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size for the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity available in stock for the specified size */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the warehouse where the inventory is stored */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Specific location within the warehouse where the inventory is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the loyalty program the customer is part of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address to which the order was shipped */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used to pay for the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of order */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Any discount applied to the order item */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount calculated for the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the size chart */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size referenced */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of the size chart */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement used in the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated order item */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the return was processed */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded to the customer for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_item_id") REFERENCES order_items ("order_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts since the last successful login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
